headline: B of A Securities Maintains Neutral on Builders FirstSource, Lowers Price Target to $100
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Rafe Jasrosich   maintains Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $123 to $100.
